notes: F004 build closed out. _BASE_CSS now ships (a) .nav flex-wrap so seven pills reflow at 375 px, (b) a base-level @media (max-width: 700px) block that tightens body padding and pins position:fixed #updated inline. Every existing page (HUB, V1, V2, HQ) inherits the new rules automatically via the __BASE_CSS__ substitution. Sprint 0 pages (F001/F002/F003) already ship their own 700 px block on top. Smoke test tests/platform/test_mobile_responsive.py (62 parametrised tests) locks the invariants: viewport meta, breakpoint range 400-900 px, canonical 700 px on Sprint-0 pages, no body-level horizontal scroll, no font-size < 10 px. Platform suite 286 -> 348.
review_criteria: No regressions on the 286 pre-F004 platform tests
